calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Continued To Nov-05-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Olie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Karen Fransworth.
Atty. Arturo Matthews, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Half International Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gary Leach, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the Exhibits and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: One Link Corporation as follows:
Principal $148,949.20
Interest- $14,772.50
Costs $405.95, for a total of $164,127.65.
Judgment signed in Open Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Continued To Sep-24-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
